caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" and "MAN" printed in white, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him, a white wall features a logo with the words "ENFORCE HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the scene, displaying a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the first frame, he looks forward with a neutral expression. By the second frame, he begins to gesture with his right hand. In the third frame, his right arm extends further outward as he continues to talk. In the final frame, he maintains a speaking posture, looking slightly to the side.
